server/src/image_tool/jpeg/decode.py :: _decode_block
def _decode_block(
    bit_reader: BitReader,
    quant_table: list[int],
    previous_dc: int,
    dc_table,
    ac_table,
) -> tuple[list[list[float]], int]:
    diff_category = decode_huffman_value(bit_reader, dc_table)
    diff = decode_signed_magnitude(bit_reader, diff_category)
    dc = previous_dc + diff
    coefficients = [dc] + [0] * 63
    index = 1
    while index < 64:
        symbol = decode_huffman_value(bit_reader, ac_table)
        if symbol == 0x00:
            break
        if symbol == 0xF0:
            index += 16
            continue
        zero_run = symbol >> 4
        magnitude_category = symbol & 0x0F
        index += zero_run
        if index >= 64:
            break
        coefficients[index] = decode_signed_magnitude(bit_reader, magnitude_category)
        index += 1
    block = dequantize_block(coefficients, quant_table)
    return inverse_dct(block), dc

def _decode_jpeg_native(data: bytes) -> Raster:
    index = 0
    if data[index : index + 2] != b"\xFF\xD8":
        raise ValueError("Not a JPEG image.")

    width = 0
    height = 0
    components = 0
    quant_tables: dict[int, list[int]] = {}
    huffman_tables: dict[tuple[int, int], object] = {
        (0, 0): DC_LUMINANCE,
        (0, 1): DC_CHROMINANCE,
        (1, 0): AC_LUMINANCE,
        (1, 1): AC_CHROMINANCE,
    }
    entropy_start = 0

    while index < len(data):
        if data[index] != 0xFF:
            index += 1
            continue
        marker, index, payload = _read_marker(data, index)
        if marker == 0xC0:
            height = struct.unpack_from(">H", payload, 1)[0]
            width = struct.unpack_from(">H", payload, 3)[0]
            components = payload[5]
        elif marker == 0xDB:
            table_id = payload[0] & 0x0F
            quant_tables[table_id] = list(payload[1:65])
        elif marker == 0xC4:
            table_class = payload[0] >> 4
            table_id = payload[0] & 0x0F
            bits = list(payload[1:17])
            values = list(payload[17:])
            huffman_tables[(table_class, table_id)] = build_huffman_table(bits,
